differentials.name: choroidal detachment
differentials.raw: choroidal detachment (point of fixation not at papilla)

context: floating echogenic line fixed at papilla extending to ora serrata (if acute) | thick folded fixed echogenic line (if chronic) | ± anechoic retinal cysts | fluid = anechoic; blood = anechoic / hypoechoic with low-level echoes; neoplasm = solid
